Info.ToolboxConfigModel: {"entries":[{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_265f5b49-b0d2-42d4-b9c8-9701453d95c2","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_265f5b49-b0d2-42d4-b9c8-9701453d95c2"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"10502cf8-f328-4c51-bdfe-03975c1eedff"},"authorEmail":"Richard.Timko@vutbr.cz","authorName":"Richard Timko","authorOrganization":"Brno University of Technology","description":"The application provides a parametric environment to simulate the hobbing manufacturing process and analyze the meshing characteristics of gear pairs. Integrated algorithms offer interactive visualization of the line of action and kinematic animation, bridging the gap in standard MATLAB libraries for the field of automotive and mechanical engineering.","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_265f5b49-b0d2-42d4-b9c8-9701453d95c2","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_265f5b49-b0d2-42d4-b9c8-9701453d95c2"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"8277a996-e8ae-45c0-9f60-062fba246a13"},"maxRelease":"R2025b","minRelease":"R2025b","outputFileName":"Gear_Model.mltbx","outputFolder":"/","summary":"This engineering tool is designed for precise mathematical modeling and visualization of involute and cycloidal tooth profiles within MATLAB","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"/","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_265f5b49-b0d2-42d4-b9c8-9701453d95c2","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_265f5b49-b0d2-42d4-b9c8-9701453d95c2"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"dec3c98e-72aa-4e28-8b5c-2c1c0ea424c0"},"toolboxName":"Gear Model","toolboxVersion":"1.1.1","uniqueId":"314bc661-3706-4c75-a31e-4c4a9563196a"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"7928cdaf-027c-4467-b9e9-10e5148c60c5"},{"content":{},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectStateValidationIssueList","uuid":"baf9bb62-d7fa-4b27-ba44-5eee8520ae53"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
